mnemonics.title: YOLO Stages
mnemonics.content: You Only Look Once: Divide (grid) → Predict (boxes) → Refine (NMS)

mnemonics.title: Mask R-CNN Flow
mnemonics.content: Backbone → RPN → ROI Align → Mask Head (Think: BRR M)

visualTips.visualization: Imagine multiple aspect ratio templates sliding over feature maps
Picture contracting encoder path + expanding decoder path with skip bridges

analogies.analogy: Like coloring book - fill regions with specific colors based on content
Similar to picking best candidate from overlapping job applications
